source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Three congruent isosceles triangles $DAO,$ $AOB,$ and $OBC$ have $AD=AO=OB=BC=10$ and $AB=DO=OC=12.$ These triangles are arranged to form trapezoid $ABCD,$ as shown. Point $P$ is on side $AB$ so that $OP$ is perpendicular to $AB.$ <image1> What is the length of $OP?$
